phone.title: Enter your phone

otp.title: Verify your number
otp.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to {{phone}}.

profile.title: Tell us about you
profile.subtitle: We'll use this to set up your wallet.

errors.invalid_phone: Enter a valid phone number with country code.
errors.otp_request_failed: Could not send verification code. Please try again.

home.dcse_eligible_note: You can take an early advance against earned wages.
home.dcse_ineligible_note: Advances unlock once your account is fully verified.

errors.compliance_body: Money movement is paused pending a compliance review. Our team is on it — you'll be notified once cleared.
errors.account_blocked_body: Your account is currently inactive. Please contact support.
errors.kyc_body: Verify your Emirates ID to unlock advances, remittance and card features.
errors.biometric_body: Please re-authenticate with FaceID or fingerprint to continue.
errors.over_limit_body: Requested amount exceeds your available advance limit for this cycle.
